title: Implement a worker that escalates to on-call on final-attempt failure
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.CriticalSyncWorker` (queue `:critical`, max_attempts 3). perform/1 takes `%{"entity_id" => id}` and receives `%Oban.Job{attempt: attempt, max_attempts: max_attempts}`. Call `MyApp.Sync.run(id)`. On `:ok`, return `:ok`. On `{:error, reason}` AND `attempt < max_attempts`, return `{:error, reason}` (let Oban retry). On `{:error, reason}` AND `attempt == max_attempts`, call `MyApp.OnCall.page(:critical_sync_failed, %{entity_id: id, reason: reason})` before returning `{:error, reason}` — this fires the page on the final attempt only, not every retry. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/critical_sync_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: The final-attempt escalation pattern is a common production need but easy to get wrong (paging on every attempt).
